subcodes.first_line: O branch of the tree of divine mercy! Jinab-i-Aqa 'Abdu'l-Ghaffar hath repeatedly expressed utmost grievance concerning his father Haji [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فرع شجره رحمانیت جناب آقا عبدالغفار مکرر نهایت شکایت از ابویشان حاجی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @petitions to authorities, @business; financial; property matters
